pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines Triton/CUTLASS fused MLP kernels, a wider sp4608 stack with all-int6 GPTQ, and a fast causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward in MLP to keep intermediates in registers
Uniform int6 GPTQ with LR floor 0.05 and MLP 3.5× widening
GPU-side causal n-gram tilt that proposes hinted tokens from the strict prefix
